commands.review_summary:
This PR changes embedded attempt session write-lock option resolution to derive the fallback max hold from the compaction timeout plus grace, and adds focused regression and lifecycle tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main calculates the embedded lock max-hold fallback from run timeout plus compaction timeout, and the PR body shows after-fix runtime output resolving the same helper to 720000ms for a 600000ms compaction timeout. I did not rerun a live channel reproduction in this read-only review.
